channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 22.5%.

item.title: i Politics: Starmer to ready UK for war with billions in defence spending
item.description: Starmer to ready UK for war with billions in defence spending

item.title: The Guardian: Greens to run scaled-back campaign in Makerfield byelection in potential boost for Burnham - The Guardian

item.title: BBC Politics: John Swinney denies 'sweeping Murrell scandal under carpet'
item.description: John Swinney denies 'sweeping Murrell scandal under carpet'

item.title: i Politics: Cabinet ministers feared Trump's reaction to social media ban
item.description: Cabinet ministers feared Trump's reaction to social media ban

item.title: ITVX: Starmer promises action to tackle social media harm in 'weeks, not months' - ITVX
item.description: Starmer promises action to tackle social media harm in 'weeks, not months' - ITVX

item.title: i Politics: 'Farage is Nando’s lemon and herb': Inside the Reform and Restore row

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour says Reform UK ‘in chaos’ as Zia Yusuf publicly tells Jenrick he’s got party’s deportation policy wrong – as it happened
item.description: Labour says Reform UK ‘in chaos’ as Zia Yusuf publicly tells Jenrick he’s got party’s deportation policy wrong – as it happened

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer vows to act on social media after meeting bereaved parents
item.description: Starmer vows to act on social media after meeting bereaved parents

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer says ‘questions need to be answered’ over Murrell embezzlement as SNP urged to launch inquiry
item.description: Starmer says ‘questions need to be answered’ over Murrell embezzlement as SNP urged to launch inquiry
